name: How is GEO different from SEO?
description: SEO helps you rank in search results, while GEO helps your content get cited or summarized in AI-generated answers.

mainEntity.name: How is GEO different from SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: SEO and GEO overlap, but they are not the same. SEO focuses on ranking in traditional search results, while GEO focuses on being referenced inside AI-generated answers. In practice, strong SEO helps GEO, but GEO adds extra emphasis on structure, citations, and machine-readable clarity.
acceptedAnswer.description: SEO helps you rank in search results, while GEO helps your content get cited or summarized in AI-generated answers.
